events.label: reasoning
events.text: We are asked to produce JSON output for a scenario: "wrong root gap" in spool erection & fit-up. The work stage is rough-complete. The component condition is "installed-defective". The decision should be fail because wrong root gap is a defect that would lead to non-compliance with ASME B31.3. Risk is high or critical? Root gap is critical for weld quality; if wrong, it could lead to weld failure, so risk is high. Work stage is rough-complete. Percent complete: maybe 80%? But we need a number. Since it's roughed in but not closed out, maybe 70-80%. I'll put 75. Value: not applicable. Sound source: not applicable. Confidence: high, say 0.95. Event time, rate, order, workable: not needed. Findings: "Wrong root gap observed in spool fit-up." Actions: "Stop work, correct root gap per WPS and iso drawing, re-inspect before welding." Rationale: "Root gap outside specified tolerance per ASME B31.3 can lead to incomplete fusion or excessive stress, compromising joint integrity." References: "ASME B31.3, project iso drawings". So JSON.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective"],
  "percent_complete": 75,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": ["Wrong root gap observed in spool fit-up."],
  "actions": ["Stop work, correct root gap per WPS and iso drawing, re-inspect before welding."],
  "rationale": "Root gap outside specified tolerance per ASME B31.3 can lead to incomplete fusion or excessive stress, compromising joint integrity.",
  "references": ["ASME B31.3", "project iso drawings"]
}
